summary: Extracted 15 signals across 11 categories (hierarchy-design, cross-cutting-agents, adversarial-pattern, two-tier-quality, convergence-trajectory, write-protocol-pitfall, artifact-granularity, sequential-creative-pipeline, beta-reader-lens-pattern, cross-reference-ghost-agents, invariant-scale, guide-ask-questions-tension, depth-decision-criteria, result-code-vocabulary, subdomain-decomposition). 7 high-strength, 8 medium-strength. Cold start — no prior knowledge to filter against. All signals are novel craft-domain insights from the first romantic-fantasy-writer factory run.
